summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Digital Twin Agent installer taskkill timeout fix. Verified that install.cmd no longer contains bare 'taskkill /F /IM' commands in LIVE code, contains the new PowerShell backgrounded process killer with 5-second hard timeout, and all regression checks pass.
passed_tests: Auth login with admin@digitaltwin.com / ChangeMe!2026
GET /api/agent/installer/info returns available=true, bundle=true
POST /api/agent/installer/download-init returns fresh DT-3PCG-COPV pairing_code
GET /api/agent/installer/download returns HTTP 200 application/zip
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'taskkill /F /IM agent.exe' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'taskkill /F /IM DigitalTwinAgent.exe' (correctly removed)
install.cmd LIVE code does NOT contain 'taskkill /F /IM uninstaller.exe' (correctly removed)

install.cmd LIVE code contains the exact PowerShell one-liner: start /B /MIN "" powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; foreach ($n in @('agent','DigitalTwinAgent','uninstaller')) { Get-Process -Name $n | Stop-Process -Force }" >nul 2>&1
install.cmd LIVE code contains ping sleep timebox: '>nul ping -n 6 127.0.0.1'
install.cmd contains updated [2/5] echo: 'echo [2/5] Terminating any leftover agent executables (max ~5 seconds) ...'
install.cmd contains '[1/5] Stopping any existing DigitalTwinAgent Windows service ...'
install.cmd contains '[2/5] Terminating any leftover agent executables (max ~5 seconds) ...'
install.cmd contains '[3/5] Cleaning previous install directory (if any) ...'
install.cmd contains '[4/5] Preparing install directory %INSTALL_ROOT% ...'
install.cmd contains '[5/5] Launching installer against %BACKEND_URL% ...'
install.cmd contains PowerShell UAC self-elevation 'Start-Process -Verb RunAs' [regression]
install.cmd contains DPAPI 'CredWriteW' P/Invoke [regression]
install.cmd contains 'fsutil dirty query %SYSTEMDRIVE%' probe [regression]
install.cmd contains 'set "BACKEND_URL=https://safe-import-pro.preview.emergentagent.com"' [regression]
install.cmd contains 'set "__PAIRING_CODE=DT-3PCG-COPV"' with correct pairing code [regression]
install.cmd contains final installer invocation with '--api-url "%BACKEND_URL%" --no-pair --silent' [regression]
install.cmd has balanced parentheses (68 open, 68 close) [regression]
install.cmd has balanced double-quotes (96 quotes, even number) [regression]
install.cmd is under 20KB (15.4 KB) [regression]
